---
title: "benchmark_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\benchmark_engine.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.45
style_score: 4.00
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.60
---

## Intent
The `benchmark_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on benchmark. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via benchmark. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [statistics](file://statistics)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `benchmark`
